title: Cryptographic Randomness, Entropy, Keys, Salts, and Nonces · Program Defense
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for cryptographic randomness, entropy, keys, salts, and nonces and accepts only bounded behavior, causal changed-case evidence, and an explicit native, entropy, interoperability, side-channel, compliance, or production transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for randomness and uniqueness contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use current Go cryptographic randomness APIs for keys, tokens, salts, nonces, and blinding while handling failure according to the API contract.
Distinguish entropy sources, deterministic random bit generators, unpredictability, uniqueness, bias, and statistical appearance.
Generate algorithm-compatible keys at supported strengths and retain provenance, purpose, owner, and creation evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Crypto Go Salt Token Boundary
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz cryptographic engineering team handles case 7982 during a post-quantum compatibility canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to budget cryptographic randomness and nonce uniqueness across use, restart, and rollback; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate public unique salts, unpredictable bearer tokens, nonces, IVs, seeds, and secret keys by their exact guarantees.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Crypto Go Salt Token Boundary.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate public unique salts, unpredictable bearer tokens, nonces, ivs, seeds, and secret keys by their exact guarantees. For Cryptography and Go Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Crypto Go Salt Token Boundary, keep Crypto Go Salt Token Boundary connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
